SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 06

JUDGE BALLATI, GGOROSIN, CLERK, C.O'LEARY, REPORTER 4:05 PM C/C SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. MILTON KATZ FOR PLTF, JORGE DE QUESADA FOR DEFTS. CASE SETTLED, TERMS ON THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS: FOR $4,750, PLTF, WILL DISMISS CASE AS TO ALL DEFTS. PAYMENT TO BE MADE IN 30 DAYS. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS & ATTYS FEES. TO THE EXTENT THAT THE $4,750 IS ALLOWED AS AN OFFSET FOR ANY DISABILITY OR PERMANENT DISABILITY AS FAR AS WORKMEN'S COMPENSATION IS CONCERNED, PLTF, WILL AGREE TO IT. TERMS AGREEABLE TO ALL PARTIES.
